meaning: n.莫理斯舞(英国传统民间舞蹈,舞者通常为男子,身上系铃,扮民间传说中的人物)
examples: Morris had pleaded guilty to robbery.
Morris ignored the question and continued his monologue.
Alcatraz was considered escape-proof, but in 1962 the Anglin brothers and Frank Morris disappeared on a raft.
Professor Morris will also develop and maintain a regional database of religious groups and communities including research resources.
